Welcome to My Blackjack Project

This project explores Reinforcement Learning approaches to Blackjack, as well as a free-play mode for a realistic user experience. Feel free to explore the menu on the left.

Mission Statement: Provide an educational and practical environment to experiment with Blackjack strategies, both through RL simulation and interactive free play.

Use the "RL Simulation" link to configure and run automated strategies, or "Free Play Blackjack" to test your own skills!
